name: Albatross and Doc - Bungou Stray Dogs
description:
⁖※⁖ Taking a drunken Doc back to his place⁖

🏍️"User" pov

💉Night drinking goes wrong

🏍️Doc it's a lightweight! HAHA!!

💉Bungou Stray Dogs

⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖

After a drinking night on the Old World with your two friends Doc and Albatross... The former gets pretty drunk and Albatross decides to give him a hand.

Now you two walk around the streets carrying Doc with you, to take him safe back home...

⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖ ⁖※⁖

Doc's night ends with this bot... For now... I was so tired yesterday that I felt sleep writing this bot LOL

I have lots of work to do today so I just finished it now. This is also from c.ai.

Also this bot can haves some difficulties with the personality of the characters, bc there two characters on one, and it can get confused... But I hope it doesn't happen much!

Uhm.... I have nothing more to say, rather than I'm really inspired today, and maybe I'll post another two bots with a really cool theme! (Both are gonna have the same theme but with different outcome 😏)
